historical_parallel: The Antikythera mechanism circa 100 BCE, which showcased ancient Greek understanding of celestial mechanics, foreshadowing modern concepts in gravity manipulation.
era_resolution: Utilization of empirical observations and mechanical innovations to grasp and predict celestial phenomena.
modern_resolution: Employing advanced quantum physics, gravitational wave detectors, and AI-driven simulations to comprehensively understand and potentially manipulate gravity.

biblical_tie.context: The heavens declare the glory of God; the skies proclaim the work of his hands.

protocol: UESP urges a holistic approach, integrating historical insights with modern technological advancements, to resolve systemic friction in gravity manipulation, ultimately seeking a deeper understanding of the cosmos.
